servinfo.title: ECM Registration
servinfo.ptxt: After ECM is replaced with new one, register keyless start control module information to the ECM using SUZUKI scan tool and immobilizer cable.

item.ptxt: Perform “ECM Registration” in “Immobilizer” menu indicated on SUZUKI scan tool.
Refer to “Immobilizer Control System Operator’s Manual”.
When ECM is replaced with new one, refer to Procedure after ECM Replacement .

When ECM and keyless start control module are replaced with new ones at the same time, perform “Immobilizer Key Registration” instead of “ECM Registration” using SUZUKI scan tool and immobilizer cable. Refer to “Immobilizer Control System Operator’s Manual” for the immobilizer registration.
